what_it_does: This file is a minimal channel-attachment metadata record that associates attachment att-7a262bb0 (type board_items) with board item item-99a1d803 in the dragnet-development channel and records the time it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
attachment id att-7a262bb0 matches the filename
target uses the URI form board://item-99a1d803
standouts: Target is a board:// URI rather than a bare identifier
Typed as board_items, implying a board-specific attachment class
Timestamped addition with explicit UTC offset
conventions: Filename derived from the attachment id
Uses a URI scheme (board://) to reference the target object
concerns: No human-readable title, description, or reason for the attachment
notes: A bare but well-formed attachment ledger entry that links a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item and timestamps the addition.
questions: What content or action does board://item-99a1d803 represent?
Why was this attachment associated with that board item?
Who added the attachment and from what source?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a channel attachment targeting a board item; the file does exactly that, so it matches.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, queryable record that ties a channel attachment to a specific board item for development tracking or audit purposes.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme in the target field to identify the referenced board item.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting attachment provenance and board-item cross-referencing in the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-7a262bb0 of type board_items to board item item-99a1d803 in the dragnet-development channel, recorded at 2026-06-24T01:32:18Z.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed, timestamped association between a dragnet-development channel attachment and a specific board item.
